description_long: This is a freestanding, double-sided advertising board with a black metal frame and rounded top corners, designed for placement on sidewalks or near storefronts. The board features a matte black display surface with bold white and red text in Cyrillic, advertising men's haircuts and beard trims, including pricing and location details. The frame is tubular and appears sturdy, with two supporting legs on each side and a horizontal stabilizing bar connecting the legs. The display area is flat and smooth, likely made from a weather-resistant material suitable for outdoor use. The board is lightweight enough to be moved but heavy enough to remain stable in moderate wind. There are no visible illumination features or decorative elements beyond the functional design.
description: A freestanding, double-sided black advertising board with a rounded metal frame and bold printed text for a barbershop. The board is sturdy, weather-resistant, and designed for sidewalk or street placement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full advertising surface with clear text and graphics, framed by a rounded black metal border.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the A-frame structure, tubular legs, and horizontal stabilizing bar, with no visible advertising content.
description_view_2: Rear view, identical to the front, displaying the same advertising content and frame design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the A-frame profile and structural support bar.
attribute_frame_design: tubular black metal frame with rounded top corners and moderate thickness
attribute_advertisement_content: static printed advertisement for a men's barbershop with pricing and location details
